orchestrator_disposition.reason: BLOCKED would assert an owner design rejection. The available owner input contains no approval, change request, or rejection. The approved contour plan says ambiguous or missing verdicts normalize to OWNER_DESIGN_REVIEW_NEEDS_MORE_REVIEW.

findings.fact: The prior stop gate is OWNER_DESIGN_REVIEW_PENDING.
No explicit owner design approval was provided in the latest instruction.
Normalizing the latest instruction to OWNER_DESIGN_REVIEW_NEEDS_MORE_REVIEW does not unlock desktop work.
This contour is artifact-only and does not require production code changes.
